scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p public/background public/reference/language && cp background/*.pdf public/background/ && cp ../assets/viv-icon-light-256.png public/viv-icon.png && cp ../assets/viv-icon-dark.svg src/assets/viv-icon-dark.svg && cp ../assets/viv-icon-light.svg src/assets/viv-icon-light.svg && echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/reference/language/00-preamble/"></head><body></body></html>' > public/reference/language/index.html
